scripts.install:infra: npm --prefix infra/bridge-service ci && npm --prefix infra/ai-gateway ci && npm --prefix infra/web4-hub install --no-package-lock
scripts.test: npm run test:packages && npm run test:infra
scripts.test:infra: npm --prefix infra/bridge-service test && npm --prefix infra/ai-gateway test && npm --prefix infra/web4-hub test
